name: SDE Current Contract Stabilization
decision_reason: SDE current contract documentation and evidence record the standalone boundary, non-roles, boundary scan result, and Conan package/test proof. The direct bootstrap test path has a documented dependency-resolution limitation in this local environment. Maintainer verification, new SDE features, runtime, server, editor, SagaScript, Visual Blocks, package/distribution, StarterArena gameplay, and CSharpScriptHost changes remain absent.
